:ok

event: agent
data: {"type":"turn_start","turnId":"turn-tool-1","declaredRoute":"direct"}

event: agent
data: {"type":"tool_start","id":"call-weather-1","name":"get_weather","input_preview":"{\"city\":\"Seoul\"}"}

event: agent
data: {"type":"tool_progress","id":"call-weather-1","label":"Fetching weather"}

event: agent
data: {"type":"tool_end","id":"call-weather-1","status":"ok","output_preview":"{\"temperatureC\":21}","durationMs":37}

event: agent
data: {"type":"text_delta","delta":"It is 21C in Seoul."}

data: {"choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{"role":"assistant","content":"It is 21C in Seoul."}}]}

event: agent
data: {"type":"turn_end","turnId":"turn-tool-1","status":"committed","receiptRef":"receipt:sha256:cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc"}

data: {"choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{},"finish_reason":"stop"}]}

data: [DONE]
